headline: Amphenol (APH) Stock After 67% Annual Surge Are Growth Expectations Getting Stretched
summary: Investors may be wondering if Amphenol stock is fairly priced at around US$153.80, or if the recent excitement has pushed it too far for comfort. The stock has returned 10.8% over the last week, 23.4% over the past month, 10.1% year to date and 67.5% over the last year, with a very large 3 year and 5 year return profile that has caught many investors' attention. Recent coverage around Amphenol has focused on its position as a major electronic components supplier and its role in long term...
